script:
============================================================
DAILY AI & TECH NEWS BRIEF
Generated: 2025-11-12 08:23 UTC
Duration: ~50 seconds
============================================================

[HOOK - 0:00-0:05]
Forget writing code! A single 'One Agent to Rule Them All' AI just dropped. Game-changer.

[STORY 1 - 0:05-0:18]
The 'One Agent to Rule Them All' in advanced agentic coding is real! Developers are showcasing a single AI agent autonomously tackling *entire* complex software projects – from concept to completion. This AI understands your intent and *builds* it. Unprecedented efficiency for your productivity; don't miss this revolution.

B-ROLL:
  - Screen recording of a code editor with AI autonomously adding blocks of code.
  - Animated graphic showing a complex project plan being ticked off by an AI icon.
  - Futuristic UI showing data flow/agent interaction.

[STORY 2 - 0:18-0:31]
Engineers, listen up: someone just 'cracked' Claude's advanced agent skills! A new breakdown reveals exactly how to leverage Claude for complex, multi-step tasks. This isn't theory; it’s the tactical prompt engineering and specific methods you need. Unlock Claude's full power for *your* projects. This is your playbook!

B-ROLL:
  - Screenshot of a detailed prompt chain or architecture diagram for Claude.
  - Code snippets showing API calls to Claude, with focus on agentic functions.
  - Overlay text: 'CRACKED CLAUDE AGENT SKILLS' with glowing effect.

[STORY 3 - 0:31-0:44]
Haiku 4.5 or Sonnet? Claude Haiku 4.5 promises 'light speed' agentic coding, incredibly fast for rapid iterations. But for *your* complex, reliable tasks, can it beat Sonnet? Definitive benchmarks are arriving. Knowing this comparison is crucial for your AI stack decisions *right now*.

B-ROLL:
  - Split screen comparison graphic: 'Claude Haiku 4.5' vs 'Claude Sonnet'.
  - Speedometer graphic transitioning to 'LIGHT SPEED'.
  - Animated chart showing performance metrics or a question mark over Sonnet.

[CALL TO ACTION - 0:44-0:50]
Stay ahead! Hit subscribe for your daily AI & Tech brief. Tell us: which story blew your mind today? See you tomorrow!

============================================================
END OF SCRIPT
============================================================
